creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


I haven't tested anything except building it yet, but I'm confused 
as to why cyrus-sasl is needed. In -current using --with-gssapi=/usr 
on bind97 it builds fine without it.  

Also, FYI KRB5_HOME is dependent on bsd.gecko.mk, so by default it is 
undefined, and I'm not going to include that file in the BIND ports. 

Thanks, 

Doug
